exploration_notes: The API server admission webhook chain is implemented under staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/. The architecture has three layers: (1) **Webhook admission controllers** — `mutating/plugin.go` and `validating/plugin.go` register the MutatingAdmissionWebhook and ValidatingAdmissionWebhook plugins, both embedding `generic/webhook.go`'s `Webhook` struct which provides the core `Dispatch()` entry point and `ShouldCallHook()` matching logic.
